name: TokenBatchTransfer
description: Web3 ERC20トークン一括送金ツール

scripts.build:win:dev: cross-env VITE_PLATFORM=WIN       VITE_DB_ROOT=dev npm run build && electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.build:win-arm:dev: cross-env VITE_PLATFORM=WIN       VITE_DB_ROOT=dev npm run build && electron-builder --win --arm64
scripts.build:win-store:dev: cross-env VITE_PLATFORM=WIN-STORE VITE_DB_ROOT=dev npm run build && electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.build:mac:dev: cross-env VITE_PLATFORM=MAC       VITE_DB_ROOT=dev npm run build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:linux:dev: cross-env VITE_PLATFORM=LINUX     VITE_DB_ROOT=dev npm run build && electron-builder --linux --x64
scripts.build:snap:dev: cross-env VITE_PLATFORM=SNAP      VITE_DB_ROOT=dev npm run build && electron-builder --linux snap
scripts.build:itch:dev: cross-env VITE_PLATFORM=ITCH      VITE_DB_ROOT=dev npm run build && electron-builder --linux --x64
scripts.build:win:prd: cross-env VITE_PLATFORM=WIN       VITE_DB_ROOT=prd npm run build && electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.build:win-arm:prd: cross-env VITE_PLATFORM=WIN       VITE_DB_ROOT=prd npm run build && electron-builder --win --arm64
scripts.build:win-store:prd: cross-env VITE_PLATFORM=WIN-STORE VITE_DB_ROOT=prd npm run build && electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.build:mac:prd: cross-env VITE_PLATFORM=MAC       VITE_DB_ROOT=prd npm run build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:linux:prd: cross-env VITE_PLATFORM=LINUX     VITE_DB_ROOT=prd npm run build && electron-builder --linux --x64
scripts.build:snap:prd: cross-env VITE_PLATFORM=SNAP      VITE_DB_ROOT=prd npm run build && electron-builder --linux snap
scripts.build:itch:prd: cross-env VITE_PLATFORM=ITCH      VITE_DB_ROOT=prd npm run build && electron-builder --linux --x64
